name: Zombie Derby 2
author: Poki
description: Zombie Derby 2 is a bloody, action-packed driving game created by Brinemedia. Earn money to upgrade your car and defeat even more zombies! Play Zombie Derby 2 on Poki and help save the planet from hoards of the undead. Save fuel by releasing the gas pedal during a jump. Play Zombie Derby 2 for free in your browser today. Controls:   W or up key - Accelerate AD or left/right key - Tilt car Space bar - Shoot zombies and obstacles Shift - Boost speed About the creator:    Zombie Derby 2 is created by Brinemedia, based in Ukraine.
